scripts.dev:infra: docker compose up -d mongo redis minio minio-init
scripts.ai:install: python3 -m venv apps/ai-service/.venv && apps/ai-service/.venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip && apps/ai-service/.venv/bin/pip install -r apps/ai-service/requirements.lock.txt
scripts.ai:format: apps/ai-service/.venv/bin/ruff format apps/ai-service && apps/ai-service/.venv/bin/ruff check --fix apps/ai-service
scripts.ai:health:
curl --fail --silent http://127.0.0.1:8200/health && printf '
' && curl --fail --silent http://127.0.0.1:8200/ready && printf '
' && curl --fail --silent http://127.0.0.1:8200/version && printf '
'
